{% macro render_toc_item(item) %}
  • {{ item.title }} {% if item.children is defined and item.children %}
      {% for child in item.children %} {{ render_toc_item(child) }} {% endfor %}
    {% endif %}
    • {% endmacro %}
    {% if toc is defined and toc %}
      {% for item in toc %} {{ render_toc_item(item) }} {% endfor %}
    {% endif %}
